Settings.Warning:
Please first create a new course and save it in Eclipse manually to store the EQD2 plans going to be created. Or the created plans will go to the latest non-completed course in the patient.

Click OK to continue and use the latest non-completed course

Click Cancel to go back and create the course first
Settings.Notes: !!! (1) The newly created EQD2 plans will go to the latest non-completed course in the patient. (2) After script finishes (shouldn't take longer than 1 minute per plan) please open/load the newly created EQD2 plans manually. You may need to close and re-open patient first to see the new plans.
